pkgmetadata.longdescription: flex-sources packages the pf-kernel "flex" spine — a sibling release line to pf-sources that tracks pre-release upstream Linux kernels. The flex keep-set drops cpuidle and adds archlinux's userns_clone sysctl tweaks; otherwise it mirrors the pf-kernel patchset. No genpatches are applied: most genpatches releases target Linux -stable branches, which do not exist for an upstream RC.
